---
title: "Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados"
author: Ian Hambleton
subtitle: "BNR CVD briefing, 2023"
date: 31-Oct-2025
sidebar: cvd
format:
  html:
    body-classes: bnr-briefing-page
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
page-layout: full
---

[Download PDF briefing](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/why-this-matters.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/what-we-did.qmd >}}

The briefing focuses on three questions:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### How many?

We counted hospital-registered stroke and heart attack events during 2023.

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### When?

We tracked how cases accumulated week by week through the year.

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### Who?

We summarised cases by event type, sex, and age group.

:::
:::
:::

:::



## Headline findings

::: {.grid .mb-4}

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Women</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">312</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Stroke cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Men</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">312</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Stroke cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Women</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">105</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Heart attack cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Men</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">141</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">Heart attack cases<br>in 2023</p>

:::
:::
:::

:::


## Cumulative weekly cases

The figure below compares cumulative 2023 case counts with the average annual pattern from 2018 to 2022.

```{=html}
<p class="mt-3 mb-2" style="font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;">
  <span style="color: rgb(71, 45, 117);">Stroke</span>
  and
  <span style="color: rgb(164, 22, 26);">heart attack</span>
  cases in 2023 compared with the five-year average
</p>
```

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![Cumulative CVD cases in 2023 compared with the 2018–2022 average.](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_cum_week.png){fig-alt="Line chart showing cumulative weekly stroke and heart attack cases in 2023 compared with the five-year average for 2018 to 2022." width="100%"}

[Open full-size cumulative cases figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_cum_week.png){.small}

:::
:::

Stroke cases remained above the recent five-year average through much of 2023, while heart attack cases were lower than the recent average for much of the year.

## Cases by age, sex, and event type

The figure below shows the age profile of hospital-registered stroke and heart attack cases, comparing people under 70 with those aged 70 or older.

```{=html}
<p class="mt-3 mb-2" style="font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;">
  Proportion of
  <span style="color: rgb(71, 45, 117);">stroke</span>
  and
  <span style="color: rgb(164, 22, 26);">heart attack</span>
  cases occurring before age 70
</p>
```

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![Age distribution of hospital-registered stroke and heart attack cases.](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_age70.png){fig-alt="Bar chart showing the proportion of stroke and heart attack cases under age 70 and age 70 or older, by sex." width="100%"}

[Open full-size age distribution figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_age70.png){.small}

:::
:::

## Interpretation

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/main-interpretation.qmd >}}

## Premature cardiovascular disease

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/premature-disease.qmd >}}

## Download the outputs

The briefing outputs are available in three formats.

| Description |  | Download |
|---|:---:|---|
| PDF briefing for reading or printing | {{< fa file-pdf >}} | [Download PDF briefing](../pdf/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.pdf) |
| Excel workbook with data and metadata worksheets | {{< fa file-excel >}} | [Download Excel workbook](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/workbook/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.xlsx) |
| Full public output package, including DTA, CSV, YML, PNG, workbook, and README files | {{< fa file-zipper >}} | [Download ZIP package](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.zip) |


## Suggested Citation

> Barbados National Registry. *Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados: BNR CVD case-count briefing, 2023*. Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies. Available at: https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/case-counts.html. Accessed: [insert date accessed].
